scripts.dev: npm run infra:up && concurrently "npm run dev --workspace=shared" "npm run dev --workspace=api-gateway" "npm run dev --workspace=user-service" "npm run dev --workspace=product-service" "npm run dev --workspace=cart-service" "npm run dev --workspace=order-service" "npm run dev --workspace=payment-service" "npm run dev --workspace=notification-service" "npm run dev --workspace=inventory-service" "npm run dev --workspace=analytics-service"
scripts.dev:clean: npm run infra:down && npm run infra:up && npm run dev
